message: Proposed change 'ci-quality-gate-workflow' — the first thin vertical slice of phase gated-release-path-dry-run. Created .ratchet/changes/ci-quality-gate-workflow/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/quality-gate-workflow.feature (Feature + 5 Scenarios covering: triggers on push & pull_request; job runs install->lint->test in order; failing lint goes red and blocks the release path; failing test goes red and blocks the release path; release path positioned after the green spine), and plan.md (Why/What/Design + 6-item ## Tasks checklist). Scope is the CI workflow skeleton only: .github/workflows/ci.yml (push+PR, checkout->install->lint->test) plus a reusable yaml workflow-parser and test/ci assertions of triggers and step ordering. Deliberately excludes the release-decision module and npm publish --dry-run, which are the next two phase-1 changes (release-decision-module, gated-dry-run-publish) that plug into this workflow's seam and reuse the parser. No implementation done — artifacts only, per the PROPOSE step.

Proposed change 'ci-quality-gate-workflow' — the first thin vertical slice of phase gated-release-path-dry-run. Created .ratchet/changes/ci-quality-gate-workflow/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/quality-gate-workflow.feature (Feature + 5 Scenarios covering: triggers on push & pull_request; job runs install->lint->test in order; failing lint goes red and blocks the release path; failing test goes red and blocks the release path; release path positioned after the green spine), and plan.md (Why/What/Design + 6-item ## Tasks checklist). Scope is the CI workflow skeleton only: .github/workflows/ci.yml (push+PR, checkout->install->lint->test) plus a reusable yaml workflow-parser and test/ci assertions of triggers and step ordering. Deliberately excludes the release-decision module and npm publish --dry-run, which are the next two phase-1 changes (release-decision-module, gated-dry-run-publish) that plug into this workflow's seam and reuse the parser. No implementation done — artifacts only, per the PROPOSE step.
Read plan + feature. Creating ci.yml workflow, workflow-parsing helper, and test/ci tests.

Shipped the CI quality-gate workflow skeleton. Added .github/workflows/ci.yml (on: [push, pull_request]) with a single job: checkout -> setup pnpm -> setup Node -> pnpm install --frozen-lockfile -> pnpm lint -> pnpm vitest run, in that order; red lint/test blocks downstream via Actions' default success() condition. Left a clearly-commented RELEASE PATH SEAM after the test step for the later release-decision-module gate and gated-dry-run-publish step — no publish step added here. Added a reusable workflow parser at test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts (uses existing yaml dep) exposing normalized triggers, jobs, and ordered steps plus findRunStepIndex/findUsesStepIndex for index-based ordering assertions; designed for reuse by the next two changes. Added test/ci/quality-gate-workflow.test.ts (9 tests) asserting push+pull_request triggers, checkout-before-package-steps, install->lint->test relative ordering, that any release/publish step sits after the spine, and that no real (non-dry-run) npm publish exists. Proof-of-work: 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes (lint clean, 9/9 tests, exit 0). No agent-specific branching; helper kept under test/ so it stays out of the shipped package.

Shipped the CI quality-gate workflow skeleton. Added .github/workflows/ci.yml (on: [push, pull_request]) with a single job: checkout -> setup pnpm -> setup Node -> pnpm install --frozen-lockfile -> pnpm lint -> pnpm vitest run, in that order; red lint/test blocks downstream via Actions' default success() condition. Left a clearly-commented RELEASE PATH SEAM after the test step for the later release-decision-module gate and gated-dry-run-publish step — no publish step added here. Added a reusable workflow parser at test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts (uses existing yaml dep) exposing normalized triggers, jobs, and ordered steps plus findRunStepIndex/findUsesStepIndex for index-based ordering assertions; designed for reuse by the next two changes. Added test/ci/quality-gate-workflow.test.ts (9 tests) asserting push+pull_request triggers, checkout-before-package-steps, install->lint->test relative ordering, that any release/publish step sits after the spine, and that no real (non-dry-run) npm publish exists. Proof-of-work: 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes (lint clean, 9/9 tests, exit 0). No agent-specific branching; helper kept under test/ so it stays out of the shipped package.
Proposing release-decision-module: scoping the unit-tested ALLOW/DENY spine (branch==main AND all wired gates green) as the second thin slice of phase gated-release-path-dry-run.

Proposed change release-decision-module (PROPOSE only — no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/release-decision-module/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/release-decision.feature (8 scenarios: DENY on non-main even when all-green, DENY on main when lint red, when test red, both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing signal, and an extra wired gate must be green), and plan.md with Design + a 9-item ## Tasks checklist. Vertical slice: a pure, unit-tested decideRelease() module in src/core/ci/ returning {allowed,reasons} — ALLOW iff branch==main AND every wired gate (lint+test, data-driven/extensible) is green, fail-closed otherwise; tests under test/ci/ so 'pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers them. Scoped to the decision spine only — does NOT touch .github/workflows/ci.yml or add a publish step; workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to the next change gated-dry-run-publish.

Proposed change release-decision-module (PROPOSE only — no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/release-decision-module/ with .ratchet.yaml, features/ci/release-decision.feature (8 scenarios: DENY on non-main even when all-green, DENY on main when lint red, when test red, both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing signal, and an extra wired gate must be green), and plan.md with Design + a 9-item ## Tasks checklist. Vertical slice: a pure, unit-tested decideRelease() module in src/core/ci/ returning {allowed,reasons} — ALLOW iff branch==main AND every wired gate (lint+test, data-driven/extensible) is green, fail-closed otherwise; tests under test/ci/ so 'pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers them. Scoped to the decision spine only — does NOT touch .github/workflows/ci.yml or add a publish step; workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to the next change gated-dry-run-publish.
Read plan + feature; creating pure release-decision module under src/core/ci and unit tests under test/ci

Added pure, fail-closed release-decision module at src/core/ci/release-decision.ts: decideRelease(input) returns {allowed, outcome (ALLOW/DENY), reasons[]}, ALLOW iff branch==='main' AND every wired gate (keys of the data-driven gates record) is explicitly green; non-main branch, red, or missing/unknown signal accumulates a precise per-failure reason. Added test/ci/release-decision.test.ts covering all 7 feature scenarios: DENY non-main even all-green, DENY lint red, DENY test red, DENY both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing test signal, and extensibility (extra 'coverage' gate must also be green). Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes: lint clean, 16 tests green. Did NOT modify .github/workflows/ci.yml and added no publish step — workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to gated-dry-run-publish. All 9 plan task boxes checked.

Added pure, fail-closed release-decision module at src/core/ci/release-decision.ts: decideRelease(input) returns {allowed, outcome (ALLOW/DENY), reasons[]}, ALLOW iff branch==='main' AND every wired gate (keys of the data-driven gates record) is explicitly green; non-main branch, red, or missing/unknown signal accumulates a precise per-failure reason. Added test/ci/release-decision.test.ts covering all 7 feature scenarios: DENY non-main even all-green, DENY lint red, DENY test red, DENY both-red reporting both, ALLOW only on green main, fail-closed DENY on missing test signal, and extensibility (extra 'coverage' gate must also be green). Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' passes: lint clean, 16 tests green. Did NOT modify .github/workflows/ci.yml and added no publish step — workflow wiring + npm publish --dry-run belong to gated-dry-run-publish. All 9 plan task boxes checked.
Proposing final phase-1 slice: wiring the release-decision module into ci.yml behind a main-only gate ahead of npm publish --dry-run, with parser/runner tests. Authoring features + plan now.

Proposed the final phase-1 slice 'gated-dry-run-publish' (artifacts only, no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/gated-dry-run-publish/ with: .ratchet.yaml; two Gherkin features under features/ci/ — dry-run-publish-wiring.feature (parsed-workflow: spine preserved, main-only release-gate step consulting the release-decision module after the spine, npm publish --dry-run after the gate and main-only, never a bare npm publish, no token, release path after lint/test) and release-gate-runner.feature (a thin runner reads branch + lint/test signals from env, calls decideRelease, exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY, fail-closed on missing signal); and plan.md with Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist of 8 - [ ] items. Vertical slice: fill the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml by wiring the already-shipped release-decision module behind a main-only gate ahead of npm publish --dry-run via a logic-free adapter runner, plus parser-driven and runner-integration tests under test/ci so the phase proof 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers both the wiring shape and the gate behavior. Explicitly out of scope: real publish/token/versioning (phase 4) and coverage/e2e/security gates (phases 2-3).

Proposed the final phase-1 slice 'gated-dry-run-publish' (artifacts only, no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/gated-dry-run-publish/ with: .ratchet.yaml; two Gherkin features under features/ci/ — dry-run-publish-wiring.feature (parsed-workflow: spine preserved, main-only release-gate step consulting the release-decision module after the spine, npm publish --dry-run after the gate and main-only, never a bare npm publish, no token, release path after lint/test) and release-gate-runner.feature (a thin runner reads branch + lint/test signals from env, calls decideRelease, exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY, fail-closed on missing signal); and plan.md with Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist of 8 - [ ] items. Vertical slice: fill the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml by wiring the already-shipped release-decision module behind a main-only gate ahead of npm publish --dry-run via a logic-free adapter runner, plus parser-driven and runner-integration tests under test/ci so the phase proof 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' covers both the wiring shape and the gate behavior. Explicitly out of scope: real publish/token/versioning (phase 4) and coverage/e2e/security gates (phases 2-3).
Reviewed prior slices (workflow spine + parser helper + decideRelease module) and feature files. Implementing release-gate runner, wiring ci.yml seam, and the two test suites.

Wired the final phase-1 slice end to end. (1) Added src/core/ci/release-gate.ts: a thin, shippable runner that reads the branch (GITHUB_REF_NAME) and wired lint/test gate signals (GATE_LINT/GATE_TEST) from its environment, delegates entirely to decideRelease (no new decision logic), prints ALLOW/DENY with denial reasons, and exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY; a direct-run guard makes it executable as 'node dist/core/ci/release-gate.js' without firing on import. (2) Filled the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml: lint/test steps now carry ids; added a main-only (if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') release-gate step that builds and runs the runner with gate signals mapped from step outcomes, followed by a main-only 'npm publish --dry-run' step after the gate — no bare publish, no NODE_AUTH_TOKEN/secret. (3) Extended the parser helper's WorkflowStep with an optional normalized 'if' field. (4) Added test/ci/dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts (spine preserved; main-only gate after spine consulting the release-decision module; main-only dry-run publish after the gate; no bare publish; no token wiring with comments stripped) and test/ci/release-gate.test.ts (ALLOW+exit0 on green main; DENY+non-zero off main naming branch; DENY when test red naming gate; fail-closed DENY when a signal is missing). Checked off all 8 plan tasks. Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' is green (exit 0, 32 tests pass); also verified the built runner's ALLOW/DENY exit behavior directly.

Wired the final phase-1 slice end to end. (1) Added src/core/ci/release-gate.ts: a thin, shippable runner that reads the branch (GITHUB_REF_NAME) and wired lint/test gate signals (GATE_LINT/GATE_TEST) from its environment, delegates entirely to decideRelease (no new decision logic), prints ALLOW/DENY with denial reasons, and exits 0 on ALLOW / non-zero on DENY; a direct-run guard makes it executable as 'node dist/core/ci/release-gate.js' without firing on import. (2) Filled the RELEASE PATH SEAM in .github/workflows/ci.yml: lint/test steps now carry ids; added a main-only (if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main') release-gate step that builds and runs the runner with gate signals mapped from step outcomes, followed by a main-only 'npm publish --dry-run' step after the gate — no bare publish, no NODE_AUTH_TOKEN/secret. (3) Extended the parser helper's WorkflowStep with an optional normalized 'if' field. (4) Added test/ci/dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts (spine preserved; main-only gate after spine consulting the release-decision module; main-only dry-run publish after the gate; no bare publish; no token wiring with comments stripped) and test/ci/release-gate.test.ts (ALLOW+exit0 on green main; DENY+non-zero off main naming branch; DENY when test red naming gate; fail-closed DENY when a signal is missing). Checked off all 8 plan tasks. Proof-of-work 'pnpm lint && pnpm vitest run test/ci' is green (exit 0, 32 tests pass); also verified the built runner's ALLOW/DENY exit behavior directly.

PROPOSE complete for coverage-threshold-gate (coverage slice of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/coverage-threshold-gate/ with two Gherkin features (features/ci/coverage-gate.feature, features/ci/coverage-ci-step.feature) and plan.md (## Tasks, 11 items). Thin vertical slice mirroring the phase-1 split: a PURE coverage evaluator (evaluateCoverage -> green/red against an enforced, configurable threshold, fail-closed on missing/malformed summary) plus a thin runner that adapts CI's env to it, vitest json-summary reporter, and a CI coverage step after 'test' that goes red below threshold. The signal is emitted in the release-decision GateSignal shape but deliberately NOT wired into decideRelease/WIRED_GATES — that and e2e are the sibling/after changes (e2e-cli-smoke, wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate). Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

PROPOSE complete for coverage-threshold-gate (coverage slice of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/coverage-threshold-gate/ with two Gherkin features (features/ci/coverage-gate.feature, features/ci/coverage-ci-step.feature) and plan.md (## Tasks, 11 items). Thin vertical slice mirroring the phase-1 split: a PURE coverage evaluator (evaluateCoverage -> green/red against an enforced, configurable threshold, fail-closed on missing/malformed summary) plus a thin runner that adapts CI's env to it, vitest json-summary reporter, and a CI coverage step after 'test' that goes red below threshold. The signal is emitted in the release-decision GateSignal shape but deliberately NOT wired into decideRelease/WIRED_GATES — that and e2e are the sibling/after changes (e2e-cli-smoke, wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate). Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

Implemented the coverage slice (Phase 2). Added pure evaluateCoverage in src/core/ci/coverage-gate.ts returning {signal:'green'|'red', coverage, threshold, reasons} reusing release-decision's GateSignal — green iff finite coverage >= threshold, else red with a precise reason (below-threshold or unreadable summary). Added DEFAULT_COVERAGE_THRESHOLD=68 (just below measured 68.67% line coverage) overridable via COVERAGE_THRESHOLD; a fail-closed json-summary reader (total.lines.pct, null on missing/malformed); and a thin runCoverageGate(env) runner that exits 0 on green / non-zero on red, mirroring release-gate.ts's isDirectRun. Extended vitest.config reporter with 'json-summary' (no vitest thresholds — enforcement lives in the tested runner). Added a CI 'Coverage gate' step in ci.yml after test and outside the release path (pnpm vitest run --coverage; pnpm build; node dist/core/ci/coverage-gate.js). Added test/ci/coverage-gate.test.ts covering evaluator branches, threshold override, fail-closed reads, runner exit codes, GateSignal type compatibility, and CI-step structure (coverage collection, gate after test, no GATE_COVERAGE on the release path). Verified: pnpm lint clean (0 errors), all 53 test/ci tests pass, and the built runner shows green@68.67%, red when forced below threshold, and fail-closed red on a missing summary. Scope held: NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_COVERAGE wired into decideRelease, no e2e touched; publish path stays --dry-run. Those belong to e2e-cli-smoke and wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Implemented the coverage slice (Phase 2). Added pure evaluateCoverage in src/core/ci/coverage-gate.ts returning {signal:'green'|'red', coverage, threshold, reasons} reusing release-decision's GateSignal — green iff finite coverage >= threshold, else red with a precise reason (below-threshold or unreadable summary). Added DEFAULT_COVERAGE_THRESHOLD=68 (just below measured 68.67% line coverage) overridable via COVERAGE_THRESHOLD; a fail-closed json-summary reader (total.lines.pct, null on missing/malformed); and a thin runCoverageGate(env) runner that exits 0 on green / non-zero on red, mirroring release-gate.ts's isDirectRun. Extended vitest.config reporter with 'json-summary' (no vitest thresholds — enforcement lives in the tested runner). Added a CI 'Coverage gate' step in ci.yml after test and outside the release path (pnpm vitest run --coverage; pnpm build; node dist/core/ci/coverage-gate.js). Added test/ci/coverage-gate.test.ts covering evaluator branches, threshold override, fail-closed reads, runner exit codes, GateSignal type compatibility, and CI-step structure (coverage collection, gate after test, no GATE_COVERAGE on the release path). Verified: pnpm lint clean (0 errors), all 53 test/ci tests pass, and the built runner shows green@68.67%, red when forced below threshold, and fail-closed red on a missing summary. Scope held: NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_COVERAGE wired into decideRelease, no e2e touched; publish path stays --dry-run. Those belong to e2e-cli-smoke and wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Proposing e2e-cli-smoke: studied batch manifest, the coverage-threshold-gate slice (pure evaluator + thin runner + CI step pattern), release-decision spine, CI workflow, and the built CLI (commander: --version/--help + subcommands via bin/ratchet.js). Writing features + plan now; mirroring the coverage slice split so e2e produces a gate signal but is NOT wired into decideRelease (that is wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate).

PROPOSE complete for e2e-cli-smoke (vertical-slice e2e half of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/e2e-cli-smoke/ with: features/e2e/cli-smoke.feature (7 scenarios: drive built bin/ratchet.js as a subprocess for --version/--help/a read-only subcommand, write a machine-readable result, pure evaluateE2e green/red, fail-closed on missing result, signal-shape matches release-decision but NOT yet wired) and features/ci/e2e-ci-step.feature (3 scenarios: CI builds the package + runs the smoke + an e2e-gate step after test that goes red on failure and does NOT touch the release path). plan.md has Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist (10 unchecked items). Scope mirrors the coverage slice: real signal-producer (subprocess smoke) + pure evaluator (src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts) + thin runE2eGate runner + CI step, producing an 'e2e' GateSignal but deliberately NOT extending WIRED_GATES / adding GATE_E2E — that wiring and the phase-wide test/e2e/release-gate.sh belong to the after change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate. Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

PROPOSE complete for e2e-cli-smoke (vertical-slice e2e half of phase coverage-and-e2e-gates). Created .ratchet/changes/e2e-cli-smoke/ with: features/e2e/cli-smoke.feature (7 scenarios: drive built bin/ratchet.js as a subprocess for --version/--help/a read-only subcommand, write a machine-readable result, pure evaluateE2e green/red, fail-closed on missing result, signal-shape matches release-decision but NOT yet wired) and features/ci/e2e-ci-step.feature (3 scenarios: CI builds the package + runs the smoke + an e2e-gate step after test that goes red on failure and does NOT touch the release path). plan.md has Why/What Changes/Design and a ## Tasks checklist (10 unchecked items). Scope mirrors the coverage slice: real signal-producer (subprocess smoke) + pure evaluator (src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts) + thin runE2eGate runner + CI step, producing an 'e2e' GateSignal but deliberately NOT extending WIRED_GATES / adding GATE_E2E — that wiring and the phase-wide test/e2e/release-gate.sh belong to the after change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate. Publish path stays --dry-run. No tasks implemented in this step.

Reviewed plan + features + coverage-slice conventions; verified built CLI (--version=0.1.0, --help lists commands, init --tools none + list exit 0). Starting implementation: smoke script, e2e-gate module, CI step, tests.

Implemented the e2e slice (all plan tasks 1.1-5.2 checked). Added test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh: builds the package then drives the BUILT CLI as a subprocess (node bin/ratchet.js --version exits 0 + prints version; --help exits 0 + lists commands; init --tools none + list run end to end in a scratch dir), asserting exit code + stdout only — never importing internals. It writes a fail-closed, atomic machine-readable result (test/e2e/.results/cli-smoke.json: per-check name/passed + overall ok; {ok:false} placeholder laid down before checks so a crash can't leave a stale green). Added src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts: pure evaluateE2e (green iff parsed AND ok AND no check failed, else red naming the failing check(s) / incomplete run / unreadable result), readE2eResult (null on missing/malformed/shape-mismatch -> fail-closed red), and thin runE2eGate(env) runner with isDirectRun(), reusing GateSignal from release-decision.ts. Added the e2e CI step to .github/workflows/ci.yml after test/coverage and outside the release path (pnpm build; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh; node dist/core/ci/e2e-gate.js). Added test/ci/e2e-gate.test.ts (evaluator + reader + runner behavior incl. type-compat with GateSignal, plus structural CI-step assertions via the workflow helper: build step, smoke step, e2e-gate after test, and no GATE_E2E on the release path). Gitignored test/e2e/.results/. Verified: pnpm lint clean; pnpm vitest run test/ci => 71 passed; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh => green; built runner exits 0 on green, 1 on a forced failed check, 1 fail-closed on missing result. SCOPE: produces the e2e signal only — NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_E2E on the release path, release-decision/release-gate spine untouched, no release-gate.sh assembled, publish path still --dry-run; wiring belongs to wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Implemented the e2e slice (all plan tasks 1.1-5.2 checked). Added test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh: builds the package then drives the BUILT CLI as a subprocess (node bin/ratchet.js --version exits 0 + prints version; --help exits 0 + lists commands; init --tools none + list run end to end in a scratch dir), asserting exit code + stdout only — never importing internals. It writes a fail-closed, atomic machine-readable result (test/e2e/.results/cli-smoke.json: per-check name/passed + overall ok; {ok:false} placeholder laid down before checks so a crash can't leave a stale green). Added src/core/ci/e2e-gate.ts: pure evaluateE2e (green iff parsed AND ok AND no check failed, else red naming the failing check(s) / incomplete run / unreadable result), readE2eResult (null on missing/malformed/shape-mismatch -> fail-closed red), and thin runE2eGate(env) runner with isDirectRun(), reusing GateSignal from release-decision.ts. Added the e2e CI step to .github/workflows/ci.yml after test/coverage and outside the release path (pnpm build; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh; node dist/core/ci/e2e-gate.js). Added test/ci/e2e-gate.test.ts (evaluator + reader + runner behavior incl. type-compat with GateSignal, plus structural CI-step assertions via the workflow helper: build step, smoke step, e2e-gate after test, and no GATE_E2E on the release path). Gitignored test/e2e/.results/. Verified: pnpm lint clean; pnpm vitest run test/ci => 71 passed; bash test/e2e/cli-smoke.sh => green; built runner exits 0 on green, 1 on a forced failed check, 1 fail-closed on missing result. SCOPE: produces the e2e signal only — NO WIRED_GATES change, NO GATE_E2E on the release path, release-decision/release-gate spine untouched, no release-gate.sh assembled, publish path still --dry-run; wiring belongs to wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate.

Proposing: scoped a thin vertical slice — extend WIRED_GATES with coverage+e2e, pass GATE_COVERAGE/GATE_E2E into the release-gate step, add the phase proof harness test/e2e/release-gate.sh. Writing features + plan.

Proposed change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate (vertical-slice, after coverage-threshold-gate + e2e-cli-smoke). Wrote .ratchet/changes/wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate/ with: features/ci/wire-release-gate.feature (6 scenarios: WIRED_GATES gains coverage+e2e, ALLOW only when lint+test+coverage+e2e green on main, DENY on coverage-red / e2e-red / missing signals, workflow feeds GATE_COVERAGE+GATE_E2E fail-closed, publish stays --dry-run), features/e2e/release-gate.feature (3 scenarios: green run stays ALLOW dry-run, forced coverage-below-threshold and forced failing e2e each flip to DENY), and plan.md with an 8-item Tasks checklist. The slice is data-only: extend WIRED_GATES to ['lint','test','coverage','e2e'] and pass the coverage/e2e step outcomes into the release-gate step (decideRelease unchanged), plus ship the phase proof harness test/e2e/release-gate.sh. Artifacts only — no implementation in this step.

Proposed change wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate (vertical-slice, after coverage-threshold-gate + e2e-cli-smoke). Wrote .ratchet/changes/wire-coverage-e2e-into-release-gate/ with: features/ci/wire-release-gate.feature (6 scenarios: WIRED_GATES gains coverage+e2e, ALLOW only when lint+test+coverage+e2e green on main, DENY on coverage-red / e2e-red / missing signals, workflow feeds GATE_COVERAGE+GATE_E2E fail-closed, publish stays --dry-run), features/e2e/release-gate.feature (3 scenarios: green run stays ALLOW dry-run, forced coverage-below-threshold and forced failing e2e each flip to DENY), and plan.md with an 8-item Tasks checklist. The slice is data-only: extend WIRED_GATES to ['lint','test','coverage','e2e'] and pass the coverage/e2e step outcomes into the release-gate step (decideRelease unchanged), plus ship the phase proof harness test/e2e/release-gate.sh. Artifacts only — no implementation in this step.
Starting: read plan + all gate modules/tests/workflow. Implementing WIRED_GATES extension, workflow env wiring, tests, and the release-gate.sh proof harness.

Wired the coverage and e2e signals into the release decision. (1.1) Extended WIRED_GATES in src/core/ci/release-gate.ts to ['lint','test','coverage','e2e']; decideRelease in release-decision.ts is UNCHANGED (the wired-gate set is data — the keys of the gates record). (1.2) Added GATE_COVERAGE/GATE_E2E to the release-gate step env in .github/workflows/ci.yml, each sourced from its step outcome and fail-closed to 'red'; refreshed the now-stale coverage/e2e step comments; the npm publish --dry-run step is unchanged. (2.1) Expanded test/ci/release-gate.test.ts: ALLOW requires all four gates green on main; DENY (with matching reason) when coverage red, e2e red, and fail-closed DENY when coverage or e2e signal is missing. (2.2) Extended test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts to capture step env and added structural assertions in dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts that the gate step wires GATE_COVERAGE/GATE_E2E from steps.coverage/e2e.outcome alongside lint/test, publish still --dry-run. Flipped the two now-obsolete boundary tests (coverage-gate.test.ts, e2e-gate.test.ts) from 'NOT wired' to asserting the signals ARE wired. (3.1/3.2) Added test/e2e/release-gate.sh (set -euo pipefail, scratch workdir + trap, per-check logging): builds, drives the built CLI via cli-smoke.sh, composes coverage-gate.js/e2e-gate.js/release-gate.js exactly like the CI release path, and asserts (a) all-green main -> ALLOW + dry-run publish path exercised, (b) forced below-threshold coverage summary -> coverage red -> DENY + no publish, (c) forced {ok:false} e2e result -> e2e red -> DENY + no publish. Proposing dependency-audit-gate (security-layer-gate phase). Studied sibling slices (coverage-threshold-gate, e2e-cli-smoke) and the release-decision spine; mirroring the pure-evaluator + thin-runner + CI-step pattern. Writing features + plan now.

Proposed dependency-audit-gate (security-layer-gate phase) — artifacts only, no implementation. Created .ratchet/changes/dependency-audit-gate/ with: (1) features/ci/dependency-audit-gate.feature — 7 scenarios pinning the PURE evaluateDependencyAudit: green on zero vulns and on below-threshold-only severities, red on a vuln at/above the configured fail-on severity, fail-closed red on a missing/malformed report, configurable fail-on (not hardcoded), and GateSignal-shape compatibility with the release-decision spine WITHOUT wiring into it; (2) features/ci/audit-ci-step.feature — 3 scenarios pinning the CI wiring: an audit step writing a machine-readable JSON report, an audit-gate step after the test step that goes red on a vuln at/above threshold, and the boundary that the release path still wires only lint/test/coverage/e2e (no security signal yet); (3) plan.md (Why/What Changes/Design/Tasks) with a 9-item '## Tasks' checklist. THIN vertical slice mirroring coverage-threshold-gate/e2e-cli-smoke: pure evaluator + thin runner (src/core/ci/dependency-audit-gate.ts) + minimal CI step + test/ci tests. Explicitly OUT of scope (deferred to siblings): the secret scan (secret-scan-gate), npm provenance prep, wiring the security signal into decideRelease, and the phase proof test/e2e/security-gate.sh (all owned by wire-security-into-release-gate). Publish stays --dry-run.

Starting dependency-audit-gate: pure evaluator + thin runner + CI step + tests, mirroring coverage/e2e gate slices.

Implemented the dependency-audit slice, mirroring the coverage/e2e gate split. Added src/core/ci/dependency-audit-gate.ts: pure evaluateDependencyAudit(input) returning {signal:'green'|'red', counts, failOn, offending, reasons} — green iff counts parsed AND zero vulns at/above failOn, else red naming the offending severities/counts; fail-closed red when counts are null. Severity ordering (info<low<moderate<high<critical), DEFAULT_AUDIT_FAIL_ON='high' overridable via AUDIT_FAIL_ON; readAuditCounts() parses metadata.vulnerabilities from pnpm/npm audit --json (returns null, never throws, on missing/malformed/non-numeric). Thin runDependencyAuditGate(env) runner with isDirectRun() entrypoint exits 0 on green / non-zero on red; signal reuses GateSignal from release-decision.ts. Added a CI 'audit' step in .github/workflows/ci.yml after test and outside the release path: pnpm audit --json > report || true, pnpm build, node dist/core/ci/dependency-audit-gate.js. Added test/ci/dependency-audit-gate.test.ts (evaluator/reader/resolveFailOn/runner + CI-step structure): green on zero/below-threshold, red at/above with reason, fail-closed on missing/malformed, fail-on override (critical lets high pass), GateSignal assignability, and asserts NO security signal is wired into the release path (release path still wires only GATE_LINT/TEST/COVERAGE/E2E). pnpm lint clean (0 errors); pnpm vitest run test/ci = 104 passed / 0 failed; dist runner builds. Scope held: release-decision.ts/WIRED_GATES untouched, no secret scan/provenance, no security-gate.sh; publish stays --dry-run. All 9 plan tasks checked off.

Explicitly out of scope: wiring the security signal into decideRelease/WIRED_GATES, npm provenance, and test/e2e/security-gate.sh — those belong to wire-security-into-release-gate. No tasks implemented; publish path stays --dry-run.

Studied plan, sibling dependency-audit-gate, release-decision spine, CI workflow, and workflow test helper. Starting implementation of pure evaluator + runner.

Implemented the secret-scan slice mirroring the sibling dependency-audit-gate. Added src/core/ci/secret-scan-gate.ts: pure evaluateSecretScan(input) returning {signal:'green'|'red', findings, allowlisted, reasons} (green iff findings non-null AND zero non-allowlisted findings; red names each offending finding by file+rule; fail-closed red when the report is null), reusing GateSignal from release-decision.ts. Allowlist is data resolved from SECRET_SCAN_ALLOWLIST (comma-separated; empty default => any finding red), matching a finding by fingerprint file:rule, bare file, or bare rule. readSecretFindings reads gitleaks-style top-level JSON arrays or {findings:[]} objects, accepting capitalized (RuleID/File/StartLine/Description) and lowercase keys, returning null (fail-closed) on missing/unreadable/malformed report or any entry missing rule/file; never throws. Thin runSecretScanGate(env) runner with isDirectRun() guard prints the verdict and exits 0/1. Added a secret-scan CI step (id: secret-scan) to .github/workflows/ci.yml after the test/coverage/e2e/audit steps and before the release path: runs gitleaks --report-format json ... || true, pnpm build, node dist/core/ci/secret-scan-gate.js; no GATE_* added and the release-gate step still wires only lint/test/coverage/e2e. Added test/ci/secret-scan-gate.test.ts (25 tests): evaluator branches (green/red/multi-finding/null/allowlist/GateSignal assignability), resolveAllowlist, readSecretFindings parsing+fail-closed, runner exit codes+allowlist, and CI-step structural assertions via the workflow parser. pnpm lint clean (0 errors); pnpm vitest run test/ci => 129 passed (8 files), including the new 25. Built and smoke-ran the runner: exit 0 on a clean report, exit 1 naming the finding. Out of scope and untouched: WIRED_GATES / decideRelease wiring, npm provenance, and test/e2e/security-gate.sh (the wire-security-into-release-gate change); publish path remains --dry-run. All 9 plan tasks checked off.

Wired the security layer into the release-decision spine as a data-only slice. (1.1) Extended WIRED_GATES in src/core/ci/release-gate.ts to ['lint','test','coverage','e2e','security']; decideRelease in release-decision.ts is UNCHANGED (the wired-gate set is the keys of the gates record, so 'security' inherits fail-closed 'green-or-DENY' semantics for free). (1.2) Added GATE_SECURITY to the release-gate step in .github/workflows/ci.yml, folded from BOTH security steps — ${{ steps.audit.outcome=='success' && steps.secret-scan.outcome=='success' && 'green' || 'red' }} — green only when both succeed, fail-closed red; npm publish --dry-run step unchanged. (2.1) release-gate.test.ts: helper now carries security, all-green requires 5 gates, added DENY-on-red-security and fail-closed-on-missing-security tests, isolated existing per-gate DENY tests with security:'green'. (2.2) dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts asserts GATE_SECURITY folds from both steps.audit.outcome and steps.secret-scan.outcome; flipped the now-obsolete 'not yet wired' boundary tests in dependency-audit-gate.test.ts and secret-scan-gate.test.ts to the positive (gate set is now COVERAGE/E2E/LINT/SECURITY/TEST). (3.1/3.2) Added test/e2e/security-gate.sh (modeled on release-gate.sh): builds, then ALLOW on a clean audit+secret report (GATE_SECURITY green -> exit 0, dry-run publish marker written); DENY on a forced high/critical audit count (audit red -> security red, no publish); DENY on a forced secret finding (secret-scan red -> security red, no publish). (4.2) Scope held: only WIRED_GATES + workflow env + proof harness changed, decideRelease core logic untouched, publish stays --dry-run, real publish (phase 4) out of scope.

Scoping thin slice: promote the dry-run publish into its own release-decision-gated JOB. Studied release-gate.ts/release-decision.ts, ci.yml release path, and sibling change conventions. Writing features + plan.

PROPOSED change 'gated-publish-job' (first slice of phase real-npm-publish-on-main). Thin vertical slice: promote the dry-run publish into its OWN release-decision-gated 'publish' job so the publish path is reachable ONLY when decideRelease returns ALLOW on main, and skipped for any red gate or non-main ref. Artifacts written: features/ci/gated-publish-job.feature (runner emits release_allowed=true|false to GITHUB_OUTPUT; ci job exposes a release_allowed output; a separate publish job needs:[ci] + if release_allowed=='true'; publish stays npm publish --dry-run), features/e2e/npx-publish.feature (blackbox reachability proof seeding test/e2e/npx-publish.sh), and plan.md with a 9-item ## Tasks checklist. Scope held to the gated job + decision-output plumbing only: publish remains dry-run, NO npm token/secret or provenance, NO version/idempotency handling, decideRelease unchanged — those are the later idempotent-version-guard and real-npm-publish changes. No tasks implemented (propose-only).

Reviewed plan + existing source/tests. Starting task 1.1: emit release_allowed from runReleaseGate and write to GITHUB_OUTPUT.

Shipped the gated-publish-job slice: promoted the dry-run publish into its own graph-gated job governed by the proven release decision, without touching decideRelease and without a real release.

1.1 runReleaseGate now returns release_allowed (= decision.allowed); the isDirectRun() path appends release_allowed=true|false to GITHUB_OUTPUT via an exported, env-guarded writeReleaseAllowedOutput (no-op when GITHUB_OUTPUT unset, so the pure path stays mechanism-free). WIRED_GATES/decideRelease unchanged.
2.1 ci.yml: gave the release-gate step id 'release-gate' and added a ci-job outputs block exposing release_allowed: ${{ steps.release-gate.outputs.release_allowed }}.
2.2 Added a separate publish job: needs:[ci], if: needs.ci.outputs.release_allowed=='true', that checks out, sets up Node22+pnpm, builds, and runs npm publish --dry-run. The previous in-job dry-run step was moved here (promoted), not duplicated. No token/secret/provenance added.
3.1 Extended test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts: added needs/if/outputs to WorkflowJob (and step id) with parsing — additive.
3.2 Extended release-gate.test.ts: runner surfaces release_allowed mirroring the verdict, and writes true on ALLOW@main / false on a red gate / false off main to a scratch GITHUB_OUTPUT (plus no-op when unset).
3.3 New gated-publish-job.test.ts: ci exposes release_allowed sourced from the gate step; a distinct publish job needs ci, is conditioned on the release_allowed output, and runs npm publish --dry-run only.
3.x Updated dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts to target the publish job for the moved publish step (kept test/ci green).
4.1/4.2 Added test/e2e/npx-publish.sh: builds, drives release-gate.js over forced branch+GATE_* against a scratch GITHUB_OUTPUT, and asserts ALLOW@main -> release_allowed=true -> publish gate satisfied -> dry-run publish reached; a forced red gate and a non-main ref each -> release_allowed=false -> publish gate NOT satisfied -> publish NOT reached.
5.1 pnpm lint exit 0; pnpm vitest run test/ci exit 0 (146 pass); bash test/e2e/npx-publish.sh PASS (all 12 checks).
5.2 Scope held: publish stays npm publish --dry-run; no npm token/secret or provenance permission (only comment mentions); no version/idempotency handling; decideRelease core logic untouched. Idempotency and real publish remain the later idempotent-version-guard and real-npm-publish changes.

3.1 Extended test/ci/helpers/workflow.ts: added needs/if/outputs to WorkflowJob (and step id) with parsing — additive.
3.2 Extended release-gate.test.ts: runner surfaces release_allowed mirroring the verdict, and writes true on ALLOW@main / false on a red gate / false off main to a scratch GITHUB_OUTPUT (plus no-op when unset).
3.3 New gated-publish-job.test.ts: ci exposes release_allowed sourced from the gate step; a distinct publish job needs ci, is conditioned on the release_allowed output, and runs npm publish --dry-run only.
3.x Updated dry-run-publish-wiring.test.ts to target the publish job for the moved publish step (kept test/ci green).
4.1/4.2 Added test/e2e/npx-publish.sh: builds, drives release-gate.js over forced branch+GATE_* against a scratch GITHUB_OUTPUT, and asserts ALLOW@main -> release_allowed=true -> publish gate satisfied -> dry-run publish reached; a forced red gate and a non-main ref each -> release_allowed=false -> publish gate NOT satisfied -> publish NOT reached.
5.1 pnpm lint exit 0; pnpm vitest run test/ci exit 0 (146 pass); bash test/e2e/npx-publish.sh PASS (all 12 checks).
5.2 Scope held: publish stays npm publish --dry-run; no npm token/secret or provenance permission (only comment mentions); no version/idempotency handling; decideRelease core logic untouched. Idempotency and real publish remain the later idempotent-version-guard and real-npm-publish changes.

Proposing idempotent-version-guard: a thin vertical slice that adds an idempotent version guard so a re-run of an already-published version SKIPs the publish without erroring the pipeline. Mirrors the proven pure-decision -> runner-output -> gated-step pattern; stays dry-run (real token+provenance is the later real-npm-publish change).

Proposed change 'idempotent-version-guard' (PROPOSE only — no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/idempotent-version-guard/ with: features/ci/idempotent-version-guard.feature (6 scenarios) and features/e2e/idempotent-publish.feature (2 scenarios) describing a thin vertical slice that makes the release idempotent — a re-run of an already-published version SKIPs the publish WITHOUT erroring the pipeline; and plan.md (Why/What Changes/Design/## Tasks) with a 9-item checklist. The slice mirrors the proven spine pattern: a pure decidePublishVersion (version-decision.ts) deciding PUBLISH (new) vs SKIP (already published), a thin runner (version-guard.ts) that emits should_publish=true|false to GITHUB_OUTPUT and ALWAYS exits 0 (SKIP is a green no-op), the gated publish job conditioning its npm publish --dry-run step on should_publish=='true', plus unit/structural tests and idempotency cases thickened into test/e2e/npx-publish.sh. Scope held to dry-run with the already-published set FORCED via env (like GATE_*); the real npm view query and real token+provenance publish with npx ratchet --version remain the later real-npm-publish change. decideRelease/WIRED_GATES/release_allowed plumbing untouched.

Proposed change 'idempotent-version-guard' (PROPOSE only — no implementation). Created .ratchet/changes/idempotent-version-guard/ with: features/ci/idempotent-version-guard.feature (6 scenarios) and features/e2e/idempotent-publish.feature (2 scenarios) describing a thin vertical slice that makes the release idempotent — a re-run of an already-published version SKIPs the publish WITHOUT erroring the pipeline; and plan.md (Why/What Changes/Design/## Tasks) with a 9-item checklist. The slice mirrors the proven spine pattern: a pure decidePublishVersion (version-decision.ts) deciding PUBLISH (new) vs SKIP (already published), a thin runner (version-guard.ts) that emits should_publish=true|false to GITHUB_OUTPUT and ALWAYS exits 0 (SKIP is a green no-op), the gated publish job conditioning its npm publish --dry-run step on should_publish=='true', plus unit/structural tests and idempotency cases thickened into test/e2e/npx-publish.sh. Scope held to dry-run with the already-published set FORCED via env (like GATE_*); the real npm view query and real token+provenance publish with npx ratchet --version remain the later real-npm-publish change. decideRelease/WIRED_GATES/release_allowed plumbing untouched.
Read plan + sibling modules (release-decision/release-gate, workflow helper, gated-publish tests, npx-publish.sh). Starting task 1.1: pure version-decision module.

Added the idempotent version guard slice. (1) New pure module src/core/ci/version-decision.ts: decidePublishVersion({version, publishedVersions}) -> {shouldPublish, outcome: PUBLISH|SKIP, reasons} — SKIP (with reason) when version is already published, else PUBLISH (empty reasons), no I/O, mirroring release-decision.ts. (2) New thin runner src/core/ci/version-guard.ts: reads local version from package.json (overridable via PACKAGE_VERSION env) and the forced PUBLISHED_VERSIONS set, calls the pure module, writes should_publish=true|false to GITHUB_OUTPUT, and ALWAYS exits 0 (SKIP is a green no-op) — pure runVersionGuard split from impure writeShouldPublishOutput, mirroring release-gate.ts. (3) Wired into .github/workflows/ci.yml publish job: a 'Version guard' step with id=version-guard runs the runner; the dry-run publish step is now conditioned on steps.version-guard.outputs.should_publish == 'true'. Publish stays npm publish --dry-run; no token/secret or provenance added. (4) Tests: version-decision.test.ts (PUBLISH/SKIP incl. empty set & present-among-several), version-guard.test.ts (writes true/false to scratch GITHUB_OUTPUT and exits 0 in BOTH cases), idempotent-version-guard.test.ts (structural: guard step + should_publish gating, still dry-run). (5) Thickened test/e2e/npx-publish.sh with cases (d) NEW version -> should_publish=true -> publish reached -> exit 0 and (e) ALREADY-PUBLISHED -> should_publish=false -> publish NOT reached but STILL exit 0; preserved cases (a)/(b)/(c). Verification: pnpm lint clean; pnpm vitest run test/ci 162 passed; bash test/e2e/npx-publish.sh PASS (all 19 checks). Scope confirmed: published set forced via env (no real npm view), dry-run only, no token/provenance, no npx ratchet --version assertion, and decideRelease/WIRED_GATES/release_allowed plumbing untouched — those are the later real-npm-publish change.
